scripts.test:runtime-contract: node --test drive/src/v2/executionLifecycle.test.js drive/src/v2/assetAuthority.test.js drive/src/v2/workerRouting.test.js drive/src/v2/connectorContract.test.js drive/src/v2/interoperabilityContract.test.js drive/src/v2/transportContract.test.js
scripts.test:v2-parity: mkdir -p .tmp-pw && TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp-pw playwright test e2e/v2-parity.spec.js e2e/release-visual-convergence.spec.js e2e/interaction-guidance.spec.js e2e/interaction-feedback.spec.js
scripts.test:v2: mkdir -p .tmp-pw && TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp-pw playwright test e2e/v2-parity.spec.js e2e/release-visual-convergence.spec.js e2e/interaction-guidance.spec.js e2e/interaction-feedback.spec.js e2e/v2-discover.spec.js e2e/v2-cluster.spec.js e2e/v2-synthesis.spec.js e2e/v2-resources.spec.js e2e/v2-home.spec.js e2e/v2-library.spec.js
scripts.test:v2-mock: mkdir -p .tmp-pw && TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp-pw playwright test e2e/v2-home.spec.js e2e/v2-parity.spec.js e2e/release-visual-convergence.spec.js e2e/interaction-guidance.spec.js e2e/interaction-feedback.spec.js e2e/v2-discover.spec.js e2e/v2-library.spec.js e2e/v2-synthesis.spec.js e2e/v2-resources.spec.js
scripts.test:professor-demo: mkdir -p .tmp-pw docs/status/generated && TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp-pw playwright test e2e/professor-demo.spec.js
scripts.release:test: npm run release:verify && npm run test:candidate-key && npm run test:runtime-contract && python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_yzu_interop_*.py" -v && mkdir -p .tmp-pw && TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp-pw playwright test e2e/rc2-release-journey.spec.js
scripts.test:ui-contract: playwright test e2e/ui-contract.spec.js e2e/release-visual-convergence.spec.js e2e/interaction-guidance.spec.js e2e/interaction-feedback.spec.js
